headline: How The Axon Enterprise (AXON) Narrative Is Shifting After Analyst Fair Value Reset
summary: Axon Enterprise’s analyst fair value has been reset from US$815.00 to US$717.68, a meaningful rethink of where some on the Street now anchor the stock. This change lines up with recent research that trims price targets after Q4 results while still pointing to solid execution, updated guidance, and sector wide multiple compression as key drivers. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces shape the evolving Axon story and what to watch next in the analyst narrative. Stay updated as...

headline: Why Axon (AXON) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of self defense company AXON (NASDAQ:AXON) jumped 5.3% in the afternoon session after TD Cowen reiterated its Buy rating on the stock with a price target of $825.

headline: Earnings Preview: What to Expect From AppLovin’s Report
summary: AppLovin will release its first-quarter earnings next month, and analysts anticipate a robust triple-digit boost in its profitability.
